272 H3F H3F_NOT_USE_TOLIET (H3F) Did Not Use Toilet Room/Commode/Urinal CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - did not use toilet/commode/urinal. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
273 H3G H3G_PADS_USED (H3G) Pads/Briefs Used CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - pads/briefs used. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
